title: MOB (Modded Ore Borders)
description: Emissive ore borders for some mods I use.
body:
Tired of missing ores when mining? Look no further than MOB!

Features borders around ores and emissive textures!

Currently available for:
- [Mythic Metals](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythicmetals)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  ![Mythic Metals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42d80fb75210415d2a535a1723f8fa2e769b1158.png)

</details>

- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) (Not updated past 1.21.1!)
- [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) (Not updated past 1.20.1!)
  
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Create](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6041d48cd8e1034a80671c92adebf40eb9ffdbba.png) 

</details>

- [Resource Nether Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/resource-nether-ores)
  
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Resource Nether Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be8a9d1a97d46def5b246e204d6d12f5f00b9c1b.png)

</details>


- [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) (Not updated past 1.21.1!)

</details>

![BetterEnd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a15682b813c41bc96ceaca2f5cb336f4ae1f24f.png) (Not updated past 1.21.1!)

</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![LighterEnd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/204627c649eedf11211d496c5a6a0f214c145a10_0.webp)

More Might Be coming soon

### For connected textures and emissive textures, be sure to have Optifine or Continuity installed!
